KeysToEntries.Misc_SnakeWine_Description: A local delicacy. An irresistible combination of an alcoholic beverage and a venomous snake. After the maceration process, the snake is virtually no longer solid. One might even call it a liquid snake...
KeysToEntries.Misc_Whiskey_Description: Aged in California bourbon and red wine barrels, this luxurious whiskey boasts an irresistibly fruity taste and beautiful aroma. On the palate, expect rich almond and marzipan flavors.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Tequila_Description: The sublime character of this extra añejo tequila is made possible by its extended aging process. Tzintzimitl Tequila spends years in American whiskey barrels and Spanish sherry barrels, imparting a distinctive flavor. Truly, a drink worthy of the stars.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Rum_Description: This luxurious and deeply flavored dark rum has a thick, almost syrupy mouthfeel. It is distilled from pure cane sugar and then aged in bourbon casks under the tropical heat of the Caribbean. A truly great rum that, despite its incredible age, maintains a perfect balance between spirit and barrel. One that every rum connoisseur will want to try.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Scotch_Description: Produced using a high proportion of first-fill sherry-seasoned European oak casks. Highly complex and beautifully balanced, this luxurious single malt whisky displays aromatic layers of smoke that give way to delicately sweet notes of toffee, dark chocolate and candied lemon.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Moutai_Description: With only a limited number of bottles available due to the lengthy aging process, Moutai 50-Year-Old is a rare and collectible spirit meticulously crafted at China's most revered distillery.
KeysToEntries.Misc_ModernWatch_Description: Modern watches feature advancements such as water resistance and more accurate hand movements, and are made from higher quality materials overall.
KeysToEntries.Misc_SleekWatch_Description: Vintage sleek luxury watch with gold-tone bracelet, gold hands, Roman numerals, and a white enamel dial.
KeysToEntries.Misc_GemstoneRing_Description: A beautiful silver and sapphire ring.
KeysToEntries.Misc_SapphirePendant_Description: A winsome gold and sapphire pendant.
KeysToEntries.Misc_PearlEarrings_Description: A pair of perfect white gold and pearl earrings.
KeysToEntries.Misc_EmeraldNecklace_Description: A modish gold and emerald necklace.
KeysToEntries.Misc_TeardropEarrings_Description: A pair of charming silver diamond earrings.
KeysToEntries.Misc_DiamondRing_Description: A beautiful white gold and diamond ring.
KeysToEntries.Misc_ElegantDiamondRing_Description: An elegant platinum and diamond ring.
KeysToEntries.Misc_LuxurySmartwatch_Description: This luxury smartwatch has several pre-installed apps for running, cycling, fitness, and swimming, while also monitoring your heart rate. It features a compass, remote pay, microphone, and more. It even tells the time!
KeysToEntries.Misc_Smartphone_Description: An advanced mobile device that combines the functionality of a cell phone with the features of a computer.
KeysToEntries.Misc_LuxurySmartphone_Description: A luxury smartphone with a distinctive, stylish design in blue and gold. It features a rugged build with an exuberant, bold, and edgy look.
KeysToEntries.Misc_CustomLuxuryPhone_Description: Crafted from the world's most exquisite and rare materials, and handcrafted to the highest standards of uncompromising excellence, this black luxury phone is the epitome of opulence.
KeysToEntries.Misc_SimpleCameraIntel_Description: An electronic device designed to capture, store, and display photographs and videos in digital format.
KeysToEntries.Misc_SimpleLaptopIntel_Description: A portable computer that is easy to carry around.
KeysToEntries.Misc_CameraIntel_Description: A DSLR (Digital Single-Lens Reflex) camera offers high-quality imaging with its interchangeable lenses and advanced manual controls. Known for its fast autofocus, optical viewfinder, and superior image quality, a DSLR is ideal for both professional and amateur photographers seeking flexibility and precision.
KeysToEntries.Misc_MilitaryLaptopIntel_Description: A rugged and durable laptop built to withstand demanding conditions. It is engineered to resist impacts, vibrations, and environmental factors, making it suitable for use in rough terrains, industrial settings, or other challenging environments.
KeysToEntries.Misc_EncryptedHardDriveIntel_Description: A secure and fortified external hard disk drive designed to safeguard sensitive data. Utilizing advanced encryption algorithms, this storage device ensures that all the files remain inaccessible to unauthorized users.
KeysToEntries.Misc_CrimeIntel_Description: A physical document containing information about crime-related activities in Lamang.
KeysToEntries.Misc_ArmyIntel_Description: A physical document detailing operational activities of the Lamang Armed Forces.
KeysToEntries.Misc_GoldCreditCard_Description: A Gold Credit Card provides superior purchasing power and other benefits.
KeysToEntries.Misc_PlatinumCreditCard_Description: Platinum Credit Cards offer access to a range of exclusive benefits and promotions, as well as a higher credit limit compared to standard options.
KeysToEntries.Misc_BlackCreditCard_Description: The crème de la crème of the credit card world. The Black Credit Card is widely considered to be the most exclusive and premium credit card in the world. The card is in fact so exclusive that details surrounding it are shrouded in mystery.
KeysToEntries.Misc_MajesticTitaniumWatch_Description: Designed by a dedicated team of 99 watchmakers and engineers. These majestic and breathtaking titanium watches represent the pinnacle of luxury.
KeysToEntries.Misc_LafDogTag_Description: A dog tag belonging to one of the officers from Fort Narith. It records their name, blood type, and personal number.
KeysToEntries.Misc_LuminoxMasterCarbonSeal_Description: The Luminox Master Carbon SEAL Automatic offers exceptional durability in a lightweight package, thanks to its advanced carbon case construction. Powered by a reliable automatic movement and featuring signature Luminox self-powered illumination, this watch ensures constant visibility and dependable performance in demanding conditions.
KeysToEntries.Misc_HyperboreaCigarettes_Description: Hyperborea is tradition. Hyperborea is luxury. Velvet-smooth and rich in flavor, made primarily from Turkish tobacco. The aftertaste? Orgasmic. Once you light one, you won’t want to put it down.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Cigars_Description: The Lambert is a meticulously curated work of art that showcases the finest traditional cigar-making techniques combined with modern innovations. With its distinct design, there can be only one.
KeysToEntries.Misc_PerfumeBottleOutlandish_Description: Vibrant and bold, this unrivaled perfume is rich in aromas that will delight anyone who values only the best. Don't miss this exquisite fragrance, featuring tropical notes of freshly picked fruits, a floral heart, and a sophisticated finish.
KeysToEntries.Misc_IDCardLocal_Description: A lost ID card of a Lamangese citizen.
KeysToEntries.Misc_DriversLicence_Description: A lost driver's license. Not having it on you when driving can cause problems with the police.
KeysToEntries.Misc_IDCardBusinessman_Description: A lost ID card belonging to a wealthy businessperson. It would be bad if it fell into the wrong hands.
KeysToEntries.Misc_TouristPassport_Description: A lost passport belonging to a tourist. It doesn't seem like the person had a good time in Lamang.
KeysToEntries.Misc_VIPPassport_Description: A lost VIP passport belonging to a wealthy tourist. So much for the promised heaven on earth in Lamang.
KeysToEntries.Misc_PerfumeBottleFragrant_Description: Created from the finest patchouli and clove plants that Indonesia has to offer, along with orange essence from Brazil. This powerful perfume blends the best of the East and West into a unique aromatic experience.
KeysToEntries.Misc_PerfumeBottleDelicate_Description: Let the golden warmth of the Brazilian sun envelop you. This delicate perfume opens with the enticing scents of pistachio and almond, followed by the smooth aromas of heliotrope and jasmine petals. It concludes with vanilla, intoxicating salted caramel, and warm sandalwood.
KeysToEntries.Misc_AzartRadio_Description: A modern military radio capable of secure, encrypted communication.
KeysToEntries.Misc_GlonassGrotM_Description: A compact navigation module designed for military personnel, providing reliable positioning and navigation data.
KeysToEntries.Misc_RuggedMilitaryTablet_Description: A durable tablet designed for field use and connected to the LAF network.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Npi2Navigation_Description: A personal navigation device linked to the LAF network for positioning and coordination.
KeysToEntries.Misc_SignalRepeater_Description: A device capable of strengthening network signals in remote areas.
KeysToEntries.Misc_BiometricAccessCard_Description: A secure access card featuring an integrated biometric scanner for identity verification.
KeysToEntries.Misc_BiometricThumbDrive_Description: A secure thumb drive featuring an integrated biometric scanner for controlled data access.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Pbg01UavControlStation_Description: An advanced UAV control station featuring an integrated display for monitoring flight data and real-time video feeds from connected devices.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Hgsc30UavControlStation_Description: A lightweight, handheld UAV control station optimized for units that must traverse long distances on foot.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Kik11TacticalKeyLoader_Description: A compact tactical key loader designed to encrypt and manage secure radio communications.
KeysToEntries.Misc_AnPyq10KeyLoader_Description: A handheld key loader designed to load encryption keys into military radios and compatible devices for secure communications.
KeysToEntries.Misc_HandheldEcmSignalJammer_Description: A handheld device designed to disrupt communications and other airborne signals in the user’s vicinity.
KeysToEntries.Misc_C2MilitaryNotebook_Description: A network-connected LAF laptop used to track and manage soldier position data.
KeysToEntries.Misc_StreletsTablet_Description: A command-and-control tablet for officers, enabling battlefield tracking, communication with mission command, artillery support requests, and live UAV video feeds.
KeysToEntries.Misc_KeyPadSheetsFolder_Description: A folder containing one-time pad keys. Though usually stored digitally today, these sheets still hold vital information in the right hands.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Ltsd43LaserDesignator_Description: A long-range military laser designator and rangefinder used for target designation and distance measurement.
KeysToEntries.Misc_R438BarrierT_Description: A portable satellite radio station designed for long-range military communications.
KeysToEntries.Misc_OperationDataEncryptedHardDisk_Desc: An encrypted storage device containing highly critical data. A skilled technician is required to extract its contents.
KeysToEntries.Misc_HackingTool_Description: A smartcard emulator paired with a pocket computer used to attack ATM authentication firmware through the card slot, forcing offline authorization states and payout sequences.
